title: Chicken Crossy Game
description: Arcade-style crossing game where players dodge moving traffic and obstacles using responsive controls, collision detection, and smooth character movement.

title: Plinko
description: Physics-based Plinko game built with Matter.js, where ball landing results are generated by the backend and synchronized with smooth frontend animations for accurate gameplay rendering.

title: Roulette
description: Online Roulette game with dynamic betting logic, real-time game flow, and a responsive UI designed for smooth user interaction.

title: Puffer Fish Crash Game
description: Crash-style multiplayer-inspired browser game with animated gameplay, live multiplier mechanics, and responsive real-time interactions.

title: Soccer 50/50 Game
description: Prediction-based soccer game with interactive animations, backend-driven game logic, and a responsive betting interface optimized for smooth gameplay.

title: Blackjack
description: Responsive Blackjack game with interactive card mechanics, game state management, and smooth betting and gameplay experience.

title: RNG Dragon Tiger Card Game
description: Real-time Dragon Tiger card game featuring RNG-based gameplay, interactive betting mechanics, and a responsive user interface optimized for smooth play.
